otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism for up to 90 days, extendable in-country up to a total of 180 days in any 12-month period
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your date of arrival
You may be asked to show proof of onward or return travel
sourceNote: gov.uk Brazil travel advice — visa-free visits for tourism up to 90 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/brazil/entry-requirements)
